markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review event proposals and align on next steps for upcoming events.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Nov 20 Birdsong Dinner:** Awaiting final approval from Marcel (budget: \~$500/person) for the 20-person dinner. GrowthX will handle GTM; Acquire will manage venue logistics.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [**Dec 4 Reception:** Planning a 30–40 person reception near the 95 Federal office. Acquire will source venue ideas, noting the budget will be lower than the Nov 20 dinner.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [**Surge Events:** The Oct 27 happy hour was self-booked at The Fog Room. Acquire should note the client's preference for cool, exclusive vibes over "airport-style" furniture for future proposals.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Partnership Offer:** GrowthX (and Surge) are open to future partnerships for AI-focused or data-centric events.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)

## Topics

### Nov 20 GrowthX Dinner (Birdsong)

  - [**Status:** Awaiting final approval from Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [**Budget:** \~$500/person.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**Attendees:** 20.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [**Date:** Nov 20 is confirmed available.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
      - [Nov 19 is on soft hold for another company.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [**Logistics:** Acquire will manage venue details (food, wine pairings) via Haley's existing relationship with Birdsong.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [**GTM:** GrowthX will manage all go-to-market activities (invites, promotion).](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

### Dec 4 GrowthX Reception

  - [**Event:** Evening reception (5:30 PM start) following a half-day program at the 95 Federal office.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [**Attendees:** 30–40.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [**Venue Criteria:**](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
      - [**Location:** Walkable from 95 Federal (South Beach area).](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
      - [**Vibe:** "Super fancy cool space" (e.g., Lazy Bear style) to serve as a draw.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
      - [**Format:** Reception drinks → seated dinner.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [**Budget:** Will be lower per person than the Nov 20 dinner due to the larger group size.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)

### Surge Event Updates

  - [**Oct 27 Happy Hour:** Surge self-booked at The Fog Room.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Client Feedback:** Loved the view; disliked the "airport-style" furniture.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
      - [**Insight:** Future proposals should focus on cool, exclusive vibes (e.g., Hi-Fi Shibuya).](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [**Dec VIP Dinner:** On hold. Acquire should keep venue options on file for potential future use.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

### Field Marketing Event Debrief

  - [**Context:** The recent field marketing event veered off-topic into AI, missing its intended focus.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new event is scheduled for Nov 6 at 3 PM PT.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
      - [**Topic:** Field marketing ROI and 2026 planning.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
      - [**Audience:** Field marketers only (no RevOps).](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
      - [**Action:** Gina will send Gloria the recording, as the time is early for a Hawaii vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Secure final approval from Marcel for the Nov 20 Birdsong dinner by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Notify Gina of the approval to lock in the venue.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [**Gina:**](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [Hold the Nov 20 Birdsong date until Monday's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [Compile a list of venue ideas for the Dec 4 reception, adhering to the location and vibe criteria.](https://fathom.video/share/gKN-2f45Jsp2bvYzujC2DYrcxmYFteLc?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
